source_pr.title: expressions: make time func now related unit tests stable
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

make time func now related unit tests stable
some tests have greater equal of less equal  assertions, 
we now cache now time value in stmtCtx, some tests become unstable 

last change has been cherry-picked to release 2.1, so this may need to otherwise 2.1-release tests may have some unstable results

### What is changed and how it works?


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test


Code changes


Side effects



Related changes
